description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered, rusty exterior and two prominent horizontal reinforcement bands encircling its body. The barrel's surface is predominantly dark brown with patches of rust and corrosion, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. A black band wraps around the middle, featuring a partially worn label with the text 'CGBOOST FUEL' and a stylized rocket logo, suggesting it once contained fuel or chemicals. The top of the barrel is flat, with visible blue stains and a small central cap or bung, possibly for filling or dispensing contents. One side of the barrel shows a streak of blue liquid running down from the top, adding to its distressed, used appearance. The overall look is industrial and utilitarian, suitable for urban or warehouse environments.
description: A large, rusty metal fuel barrel with black banding, faded 'CGBOOST FUEL' labeling, blue stains, and heavy weathering. It features two horizontal reinforcement bands and a central cap on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'CGBOOST FUEL' label, rocket logo, and blue stains on the top.
description_view_1: Rear view with no visible labeling, mostly showing rust and weathered metal surface.
description_view_2: Side view with partial label, prominent blue liquid streak running down from the top.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view, showing rusted surface and blue stains on the top edge, no visible label.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom thirds
attribute_labeling_or_markings: CGBOOST FUEL label with rocket logo, partial text, blue stains
